evals.name: health-check
evals.prompt: Hey, I just set everything up. Can you check on my network and make sure everything is healthy? I want to know if any devices are having issues, if my internet connection is solid, and if there's anything I should worry about.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive health report covering WAN status, device health (CPU/mem/temp/uptime), client counts, and any active alarms

evals.name: wifi-troubleshooting
evals.prompt: The WiFi in the warehouse seems really slow lately. People are complaining they can't load anything. Can you figure out what's going on with the wireless?
evals.expected_output: WiFi diagnostic report covering channel utilization, interference, client distribution across APs, signal strength analysis, and actionable recommendations

evals.name: security-audit
evals.prompt: I noticed some devices I don't recognize on my network. Can you do a security check and tell me if anything looks suspicious? I want to make sure nobody unauthorized is connected.
evals.expected_output: Security audit covering rogue AP scan, unknown client identification, IDS/IPS event review, and recommendations for blocking or isolating suspicious devices

evals.name: firmware-status
evals.prompt: Are any of my UniFi devices running old firmware? I want to know which ones need updates and whether any are critically outdated. Can you check and tell me what needs attention?
evals.expected_output: Firmware inventory showing each device model, current version, available version, upgrade status, and critical flags for severely outdated devices

evals.name: port-diagnostics
evals.prompt: One of my switches seems to have a bad port — port 8 keeps going up and down. Can you check the switch port status and tell me if there are errors, speed mismatches, or PoE issues? I think it's the USW-Pro-48 in the server room.
evals.expected_output: Port-level diagnostic report covering error counts, speed/duplex, PoE budget, flapping detection from event logs, and recommendations

evals.name: geo-blocking
evals.prompt: I keep seeing weird traffic that looks like it might be from China or Russia. Can you check if my UniFi is set up to block that stuff? I want to make sure geo-blocking and threat protection are turned on properly.
evals.expected_output: Geo-blocking audit showing IPS mode status, country restriction config, recent IPS events by country, and guidance to enable/harden native UniFi threat management features
